reviews.review_description: Music+Drawing my favourite meta game ever!

The app itself I wouldn’t recommend for anyone looking into music production in vr. As of now the only app that show’s promise is the dj’ing app but other than that, in terms of actually developing music there is a lot that is missing here. 

Adding a grid or grid snap for note placement would be a nice touch. 

In terms of how exactly you can write individual 4 bar loops (that play one after the other) I have no idea if that’s even a thing. If I’m writing music I want to be able to distinguish the different loops and have them play separately in order one after the other, rather than altogether. 

I understand this is in very early development but I hope this could be of some use. I like the idea of the app overall, I just think it needs a little more time to execute it more effectively.

developer_response.body: Thank you skullbones98YT for playing PaintMusic and the feedback. As you have said, the app is still in early stage, and I'm still in the process of figuring out to deliver the best experience through the app. Especially, figuring out how to combine and mix "drawing" and "music" into a VR content is a complex and time-taking work, and at the same time trying not to lose expertise of both is not an easy task. I released the early beta version of the app so that I could listen to what other think about experiences of it. Thanks again for your gameplay and feedback and I will keep trying to develier better experiences.

reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this fun music game , it is a good idea for music learner like me.  I like this idea. Please continue to add more music gameplay to this game if possible.    Please make this music game easy to learn and fun to play as well.  
I don't have any music knowledge but want to play music for relaxation.   More please. Thank you

developer_response.body: Thank you bryanlo for enjoying the game, and I'm glad that you like it. I will keep updating the game with more fun idea and contents.

reviews.review_description: I like to play this when wanting to wind down a little. I don't paint too much and just use the "Fullscale" pianos. I do wish there were stabilization settings for the brush, the lines come out all jagged. Great concept of an app.
